title: Omnitrix Definitive: Totem of Undying
description: Transform your Totem into the incredible Definitive Omnitrix from Ben 10 Omniverse! It´s Hero Time!
body:
# **🟢 The Final Piece! - Definitive Omnitrix Totem (Omniverse)**
![Definitive Omnitrix on your wrist!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6938414156f30bc1b46b1052ba2235872de501cb_0.webp)

### **The ultimate evolution of the hero's arsenal!**
This texture pack replaces the vanilla **Totem of Undying** in Minecraft 1.21.X with the **Definitive Omnitrix**, the most stable and advanced version of the device from **Ben 10: Omniverse**. Crafted by Azmuth himself, this model fits perfectly onto your character's wrist, giving you the look of the true wielder of the most powerful weapon in the galaxy. 

---

## **🔄 Versions & Compatibility**
The "Official" version is finally here for both arm types! Choose your match:

* **v1.0.0 (Slim Version):** Custom-built for **Alex**-style skins (3-pixel wide arms).
* **v1.0.1 (Classic Version):** Custom-built for **Steve**-style skins (4-pixel wide arms).

---

### **🛠️ Features**
* **Sleek 3D Model:** A clean, accurate, and square 3D model of the Omniverse-era Omnitrix that wraps around your forearm.
* **Immersion Focused:** Designed to be seen clearly while in the off-hand, making every battle feel like an episode of the show.
* **Aesthetic Focus:** This is a cosmetic pack; you still keep the regular Totem of Undying mechanics and safety nets.

### **🚀 Quick Setup Guide**
1. **Version:** Compatible with Minecraft **1.21** and later versions.
2. **Skin Prep:** Verify if your skin is **Slim** or **Classic** in the Minecraft Launcher.
3. **Installation:** Download the correct version (**v1.0.0** or **v1.0.1**) and drop it into your `resourcepacks` folder.
4. **Enable:** Go to your in-game Resource Packs menu and move the pack to the "Selected" column.
5. **Master the Device:** Hold the **Totem of Undying** in your off-hand and get ready for action!

---
**Thank you so much for downloading this pack! It means a lot to me to finally share the complete collection. Now, go show that Warden who's boss.**

**IT'S HERO TIME! 🟢⚫**
